214.des: Random mode Stage 2 fixed gold plant display

215.des: Random mode Stage 3 fixed gold plant display

216.des: Random mode Stage 4 fixed gold plant display

217.des: Random mode Stage 5 fixed gold plant display

903.des: Bridge Defense Peanut Shooter stats (ATK|SPD|SPD cap)

905.des: Bridge Defense Watermelon Warrior stats (ATK|SPD|SPD cap)

1006.des: Endless mode reward growth (once every 5 waves)

1015.des: Endless mode unlock condition (stages to clear)

2109.des: Pinball level-up EXP: formula = p1*p2^(lv-1)+p3*(lv-1) (starting at lv1)

1.see2: Peanut Shooter enters frenzy burst mode, firing a massive number of bullets for 4 seconds of non-stop attack

4.see2: Launches 15 red cabbages at the target area at once, dealing AoE damage

5.see2: Fires 3 fan blades dealing pierce damage

6.see2: Summons bamboo spike traps in a large area, continuously dealing damage for 5 seconds

7.see2: Corn Pitcher throws 10 charm bullets simultaneously; hit zombies are charmed and stunned in place

8.see2: Fires 5 bullets simultaneously, each ricocheting 5 times

10.see2: Transforms into a bold mushroom that shapeshifts into a squash and leaps into enemy crowds to crush them

11.see2: Each attack applies a non-stacking 20% slow; triggers skill that throws 10 watermelons dealing AoE damage and freezing enemies for 3 seconds

13.see2: Basic attack becomes a lightning strike, triggering the Thunder Cloud skill for AoE bombardment

14.see2: Summons shadow clones that continuously deal AoE damage

15.see2: Roars forward, dealing damage to up to 10 units and slowing them 50% for 1 second

4001.see2: Digs a tunnel straight to the base unless a wall-type plant blocks the path

4002.see2: Alternates between visible and invisible; only attackable by normal plants when visible. Only Grape Bomb can detect the invisible state.

4003.see2: Has a spring under its feet, moves very fast. Walnut Wall destroys the spring. Mounted Bouncing Zombie moves extremely fast.

4004.see2: Holds a cross aloft; as long as his body is not destroyed, he can revive multiple times, and moves very fast after revival.

4005.see2: Summons a group of minions around itself with very high HP, blocking projectile-type bullets. Weak to throwing-type plants and leeks.

4007.see2: Ignites the explosive barrel; after countdown, deals massive damage all at once

4008.see2: Moves ignoring terrain, carries a large number of zombies

4010.see2: Ground turns to ice after the snow plow passes; zombies move faster on ice. Ice and fire counter each other.

2.des: Guaranteed tier-2 equipment (1 refresh must contain tier-2)

8001.see: Each plant owned increases ATK by 1%

8002.see: Each plant owned increases ATK by 2%

10001.see: Peanut Shooter fires an extra bullet on attack

30001.see: Little Mushroom: hitting same target increases DMG by 15%, up to 5 times

50001.see: Cactus: every 5 attacks, next attack becomes a shotgun firing 5 bullets

50004.see: Cactus shotgun trigger reduced to 3 attacks

60001.see: Bamboo Shoot Assassin: sticks bamboo in the ground that explodes after 1s dealing 20% explosion DMG to up to 5 units

60004.see: Bamboo Shoot Assassin bamboo explosion DMG +100%

70001.see: Corn Pitcher: 40% chance to deal 200% DMG heavy strike and slow enemy 20% for 2s

100001.see: Cowardly Mushroom: 20% chance to spray poison on attack, 60% DMG/s for 3s

100003.see: Cowardly Mushroom: ATK +100% when not underground

110001.see: Watermelon Warrior: 5% chance to explode on attack dealing 50% AoE damage

130001.see: Cotton: on hit, splits into 5 secondary bullets firing outward at 50% ATK each

140001.see: Onion Ninja: 50% chance to fire extra shuriken dealing 200% DMG

140004.see: Onion Ninja extra shuriken chance raised to 100%

150001.see: Banana Singer: 20% chance to create ripple on attack, dealing extra DMG to up to 5 units.

150004.see: Banana Singer ripple trigger chance raised to 40%

1.see2: Idle income item that grows all base attributes

2.see2: General premium currency, mainly used for summoning

4.see2: Can be used to skip an ad

5.see2: Used to upgrade garage vehicle level

6.see2: Used to summon vehicle crew members

7.see2: Locks one attribute when refreshing character stats

8.see2: Used to refresh character stats in battle

101.see2: Can be opened to receive 50 diamonds

102.see2: Randomly opens 2-10 ad vouchers; ad vouchers can skip ads during battle.

103.see2: No description, nowhere to display this chest

1002.see2: Used to upgrade the corresponding plant

2002.see2: Hybrid plant shard, used to upgrade hybrid plants

1.see: Hello, I am your new neighbor, Waibibabu!

4.see: You've repelled the zombie horde, but you still need to keep learning!

5.see: A new plant is unlocked, try deploying it.

6.see: Next, tap to view Little Mushroom's details.

8.see: After meeting conditions, more powerful plants will be unlocked.

1.see2: What?|Not a single one can fight
1.see3: *&*……#@|Keep the head as a ball to kick

2.see3: Watch you all sell your own heads

101.see2: Summons a magnet to pinch and flatten monsters (1 second; movement speed reduced 50% while flattened)

102.see2: Explosion hits all 3 lanes at 100%, with 3-second flames dealing 50% damage per second

103.see2: Scatters 5 tomato bombs on the ground; chain explosions deal radius-150 AoE damage

104.see2:
Throws a bunch of grapes that explode in a radius-100 AoE, splitting into 5 mini-grapes as bouncing balls for 4 seconds, piercing enemies on each collision.
(Bounce within the monster path and screen edges, disappear when time is up)

105.see2: Rolling deals damage across the entire field

106.see2: Drops from the sky in front of the first enemy, blocking monsters; explodes after 1 second dealing radius-200 AoE damage

107.see2: Fires 3 Carrot Cannon shells at enemies, dealing radius-150 AoE damage

1.see2: Freezes 4 random plants on the field; frozen plants cannot attack. Tap 5 times to thaw.

2.see2: Marks a random plant, then fires a slow cannonball. Tap the cannonball 10 times to destroy it before it hits; if it hits the plant, the plant is destroyed.

3.see2: BOSS summons 1 Bungee Zombie that randomly appears on a plant and takes it away after 3 seconds

4.see2: BOSS summons 2 Drill Zombies that create holes for 20 seconds; the ball falls in and respawns after 3 seconds. Players should surround holes with plants to prevent the ball from falling in.

5.see2: Summons a water truck driving down from the top-left, blasting a high-pressure water gun to the right; hit plants are swept away. Plants prioritize attacking the truck.

6.see2: BOSS throws a zombie skull for 10 seconds. It bounces like the sun ball; hitting a plant marks it — 3 marks destroys it. Drag nearly-marked plants to dodge. Marks reset when the skull disappears.

7.see2: BOSS corrupts 2 of your plants for 10 seconds. While corrupted, if the sun ball touches them the plant attacks your own base.

20.name: Summon Taoist
20.skillDes: Fan-fires 12 swords, each dealing 1,028,000 damage, lasting 10 seconds at 0.3s intervals

1004.name: Mystic Taoist
1004.see: Randomly targets a unit on the field, dealing lightning AoE damage within radius 200

2004.name: Elite 1
2004.see: BOSS skill: Smashes all jars in 3x3 area

2005.name: Elite 2
2005.see: BOSS skill: Randomly kills 1 friendly character on death

2006.name: Elite 3
2006.see: BOSS skill: Teleports to row 6 jar upon appearing

2007.name: Elite 4
2007.see: BOSS skill: Reduces all friendly ATK SPD by 100% for 5s

1.see2: Reveals items in a horizontal row of jars for 3 seconds

2.see2: Freezes all zombies in place for 3 seconds

3.see2: Used on a single zombie, binding it for 10 seconds

4.see2: Reduces zombie movement speed in area by 50% for 5 seconds

1.see2: Basic attack fires 5 bullets, ATK reduced by 60%

2.see2: Every 5 attacks, fires 18 bullets in all 360 directions at 60% damage each

4.see2: Fires 1 fan blade dealing pierce damage at 80%

5.see2: Every 5 attacks, throws 5 charm bullets; hit zombies are charmed and stunned for 2 seconds

6.see2: Fires 1 bullet that ricochets 5 times, each ricochet at 20% damage

7.see2: Every 5 attacks, transforms into a squash and leaps into enemy crowd dealing 240% AoE damage

8.see2: Each attack applies 50% slow for 2 seconds

9.see2: Every 5 attacks, uses Thunder Cloud AoE dealing 2 hits of 120% damage

10.see2: Every 5 attacks, summons shadow clones that attack 3 times each dealing 80% AoE damage

11.see2: Every 5 attacks, roars forward slowing monsters 50% for 3 seconds and knocking back 20 distance.

13.see2: Transforms into Explosive Walnut, HP increased by 100%

15.see2: Attacks 1 selected lane; can absorb the Priest Zombie's cross, preventing revival

16.see2: Attacks 1 selected lane with 8-second flames dealing 30 damage per second

17.see2: Attacks selected area dealing 80 damage; can detonate Barrel Bomb Zombies

19.see2: Summons bamboo spike traps across the entire screen, dealing 16 damage/s for 5 seconds

20.see2: Can attack airships; attacks the entire screen

10001.see2: Shakes the barrel at a 45° angle, firing bullets continuously

10002.see2: Fires 1 fan blade that releases a ring of 5 bullets while spinning

10003.see2: Sugarcane-with-cabbage as one unit; throws 10 of these bullets at once which stick to the ground and explode after 1 second

10004.see2: Throws 3 giant fan blades that spin in place after landing for 5 seconds, dealing damage every 0.5 seconds

10005.see2: Earthquake, then ground spikes shoot upward; hit monsters are launched into the air and fall back down (1.5 seconds — effectively a 1.5s stun)

10006.see2: Hurls 3 bold mushrooms in front of monsters; they jump up and squash them

10007.see2: Rolls 5 large watermelons across the field for 4 seconds

10008.see2: Deals full-screen atomic bomb explosion damage

10009.see2: Throws multiple ninja shadow clones; each releases a spiral projectile upon landing

10010.see2: A thunder cloud attacks enemies while a fire whirlwind sweeps through the area dealing massive damage

10011.see2: Two ninjas appear beside a plant, fire 2 spiral projectiles forward while a barrage of shurikens spreads out

10012.see2: A sniper scope appears, fires one ultra-high-damage shot with a screen-shatter effect, dealing small AoE damage

34.cn: 完成普通模式第%d章解锁
34.en: Unlock by completing Chapter %d in Normal Mode
34.tc: 完成普通模式第%d章解鎖

51.cn: 请先使用兑换码激活游戏~
51.en: Please activate the game with a redemption code first.
51.tc: 請先使用兌換碼啟動遊戲~

52.cn: 任意两个植物升级%d级解锁
52.en: Unlock by upgrading any two plants to Lv. %d
52.tc: 任意兩個植物升級%d級解鎖

55.cn: 只能上阵一个杂交植物!
55.en: Only one Hybrid Plant can be deployed!
55.tc: 只能上陣一個雜交植物!

57.en: Please deploy at least one plant!

61.en: The number of ads has exceeded!

70.cn: 完成普通模式第%d章解锁`
70.en: Unlock by completing Chapter %d in Normal Mode
70.tc: 完成普通模式第%d章解鎖

71.cn: 通关上一关挑战模式解锁
71.en: Unlock by clearing the previous Challenge Mode stage
71.tc: 通關上一關挑戰模式解鎖

74.cn: 完成普通模式第3章解锁
74.en: Unlock by completing Chapter 3 in Normal Mode
74.tc: 完成普通模式第3章解鎖

75.en: Unlock Hybridization by upgrading a plant to Lv. %d

79.cn: 今日刷新次数已达上限！
79.tc: 今日刷新次數已達上限！

81.en: Can only exit after the round ends

89.cn: 附近没有可冰冻的怪物！
89.tc: 附近沒有可冰凍的怪物！

99.cn: 您上次的战斗还未结束，是否继续？
99.en: Your last battle is not over. Continue?
99.tc: 您上次的戰鬥還未結束，是否繼續？

107.cn: *排行榜每日清空，次日可以根据名次领取奖励
107.en: *Leaderboard resets daily. Claim rewards based on your rank the next day.
107.tc: *排行榜每日清空，次日可以根據名次領取獎勵

112.cn: 开宝箱提升等级，增加宝箱奖励
112.en: Open Chests to Level Up and increase Chest Rewards
112.tc: 開寶箱提升等級，增加寶箱獎勵

133.cn: 打不过去了？尝试这些方法提高植物战斗力!
133.en: Stuck? Try these methods to boost your plants' combat power!
133.tc: 打不過去了？嘗試這些方法提高植物戰鬥力!

215.cn: 你的鼓励,是我们无限的动力~
215.tc: 你的鼓勵，是我們無限的動力~

10013.cn: 花生射手进入狂热连发模式，发射大量子弹，持续4秒的无间断攻击
10013.en: Peanut Shooter enters a frenzied mode, firing a massive barrage of bullets for 4 seconds of uninterrupted attack.
10013.tc: 花生射手進入狂熱速度模式，發射大量子彈，持續4秒的無間斷攻擊

10015.cn: 一次性对目标区域抛射15颗紫甘蓝造成范围伤害
10015.en: Hurls 15 Purple Cabbages at the target area at once, dealing area damage.
10015.tc: 一次性對目標區域拋射15顆紫甘藍造成範圍傷害

10016.cn: 发射3个风扇叶，造成穿透伤害
10016.en: Hurls 15 Purple Cabbages at the target area at once, dealing area damage.
10016.tc: 發射3個風扇葉，造成穿透傷害

10017.cn: 召唤竹刺陷阱，大范围突刺持续造成伤害，持续5秒
10017.en: Summons a bamboo spike trap that continuously deals damage in a large area for 5 seconds.
10017.tc: 召喚竹刺陷阱，大範圍突刺持續造成傷害，持續5秒

10018.cn: 玉米投手同时投掷10个魅惑子弹，命中的僵尸会被魅惑，原地发愣
10018.en: Corn Thrower hurls 10 charm projectiles simultaneously. Zombies hit are charmed and stand still, dazed.
10018.tc: 玉米投手同時投擲10個魅惑子彈，命中的僵屍會被魅惑，原地發愣

10019.cn: 同时发射5个子弹，每个子弹会弹射5次
10019.en: Fires 5 bullets at once; each bullet ricochets 5 times.
10019.tc: 同時發射5個子彈，每個子彈會彈射5次

10020.cn: 变成胆大蘑菇，会化身窝瓜跳入怪堆碾压怪物
10020.en: Transforms into a Brave Mumushroom, turning into a squash and jumping into the crowd of monsters to crush them.
10020.tc: 變成膽大蘑菇，會化身窩瓜跳入怪堆碾壓怪物

10021.cn: 每次攻击都附带减速20%效果（不叠加），触发技能抛射10个西瓜，对一个范围的敌人造成伤害并且冰冻在原地3秒
10021.en: Each attack slows enemies by 20% (non-stacking). Triggers a skill that launches 10 watermelons, damaging and freezing enemies in an area for 3 seconds.
10021.tc: 每次攻擊都附帶減速20%效果（不疊加），觸發技能拋射10個西瓜，對一個範圍內的敵人造成傷害並且冰凍在原地3秒

10022.cn: 普通攻击变成雷电攻击，触发技能雷云，范围轰炸
10022.en: Normal attacks become lightning attacks. Triggers a skill: Thundercloud, which bombards an area.
10022.tc: 普通攻擊變成雷電攻擊，觸發技能雷雲，範圍轟炸

10023.cn: 召唤影分身，持续造成范围伤害
10023.en: Summons shadow clones that continuously deal area damage.
10023.tc: 召喚影分身，持續造成範圍傷害

10024.cn: 向前方大吼，对最多10个单位造成伤害并减速50%，持续1秒
10024.en: Lets out a roar forward, damaging up to 10 units and slowing them by 50% for 1 second.
10024.tc: 向前方大吼，對最多10個單位造成傷害並減速50%，持續1秒

10075.cn: 挖掘地道直通基地，除非有墙一样的植物能挡住他们挖地的去路
10075.en: Dig tunnels directly to the base. Unless there are wall-like plants that can block their digging path.
10075.tc: 挖掘道地直通基地，除非有牆一樣的植物能擋住他們挖地的去路

10076.cn: 时而出现时而隐身，只有现形的时候能被普通植物攻击。隐身状态只有葡萄炸弹能破解
10076.en: Appears and disappears periodically. Can only be attacked by normal plants when visible. Invisible state can only be broken by Grape Bomb.
10076.tc: 時而出現時而隱身，只有現形的時候能被普通植物攻擊。 隱身狀態只有葡萄炸彈能破解

10077.cn: 脚下有弹簧板，移动速度特别快。非常惧怕核桃墙，弹簧板会被核桃墙撞烂。乘骑状态的弹跳僵尸移动速度非常快
10077.en: Has a springboard under its feet, moves very fast. Is very afraid of Wall-nut; the springboard will be shattered upon collision with it. The bouncing zombie moves even faster while riding.
10077.tc: 脚下有彈簧板，移動速度特別快。 非常懼怕核桃牆，彈簧板會被核桃牆撞爛。 乘騎狀態的彈跳僵屍移動速度非常快

10078.cn: 手中高举十字架，只要肉身不灭，可以利用十字架多次复活，并且复活以后移动速度很快。
10078.en: Holds a cross high. As long as its body remains intact, it can use the cross to resurrect multiple times. After resurrection, its movement speed increases.
10078.tc: 手中高舉十字架，只要肉身不滅，可以利用十字架多次復活，並且復活以後移動速度很快。

10079.cn: 召唤一群马仔围绕自己，马仔的血量非常高，可以帮助自己抵挡弹道类子弹，惧怕抛投类的植物和大葱。
10079.en: Summons a group of minions to surround it. The minions have very high health and can help block projectile attacks. It is vulnerable to lobbed-attack plants and Leek.
10079.tc: 召喚一群馬仔圍繞自己，馬仔的血量非常高，可以幫助自己抵擋彈道類子彈，懼怕拋投類的植物和大葱。

10081.cn: 点燃炸药桶，倒计时以后，一次性造成大量伤害
10081.en: Lights the fuse on an explosive barrel. After a countdown, it causes a large amount of damage in one explosion.
10081.tc: 點燃炸藥桶，倒數計時以後，一次性造成大量傷害

10082.cn: 无视地形移动，装载着大量僵尸
10082.en: Ignores terrain and moves forward. Carries a large number of zombies.
10082.tc: 無視地形移動，裝載著大量僵屍

10084.cn: 雪车经过的地面会变成冰面，僵尸在冰面上移动速度增加。冰火相克
10084.en: The ground the Snowmobile passes over turns into ice. Zombies move faster on ice. Ice and fire are opposing elements.
10084.tc: 雪車經過的地面會變成冰面，僵屍在冰面上移動速度新增。 冰火相克

10199.cn: 每拥有1个植物增加1%的攻击力
10199.tc: 每擁有1個植物新增1%的攻擊力

10200.cn: 每拥有1个植物增加2%的攻击力
10200.tc: 每擁有1個植物新增2%的攻擊力

10204.cn: 花生射手攻击时连发一颗子弹
10204.en: When the Shooter attacks, it fires a continuous burst of bullets
10204.tc: 花生射手攻擊時連發一顆子彈

10209.cn: 小蘑菇命中同一目标时，伤害提升15%，最高可提升5次
10209.en: Little mushroom's damage to the same target increases by 15%, up to 5 stacks
10209.tc: 小蘑菇命中同一目標時，傷害提升15%，最高可提升5次

10212.cn: 小蘑菇伤害叠加次数上限+5次
10212.en: Little Mushroom: Maximum Stack Count of Damage Stacking +5
10212.tc: 小蘑菇傷害疊加次數上限+5次

10214.cn: 紫甘蓝同时发射2个子弹
10214.en: Purple Cabbage throws 2 cabbages at once
10214.tc: 紫甘藍同時發射2個子彈

10217.cn: 紫甘蓝同时发射的子弹数+1
10217.tc: 紫甘藍同時發射的子彈數+1

10219.cn: 仙人掌每攻击5次以后，下一次攻击变成散弹，一共发射5个子弹
10219.en: After every 5 attacks, Cactus's next attack becomes a scatter shot 5 projectiles
10219.tc: 仙人掌每攻擊5次以後，下一次攻擊變成散彈，一共發射5個子彈

10222.cn: 仙人掌散弹发射需要的次数降低到3次
10222.en: Cactus scatter shot requirement reduced to 3 attacks
10222.tc: 仙人掌散彈發射需要的次數降低到3次

10224.cn: 竹笋刺客攻击，插在地上的竹子，1秒后会爆炸，对最多5个单位造成20%的爆炸伤害
10224.en: When Bamboo Shoot Assassin attacks, it plants bamboo on the ground. The bamboo explodes after 1 second, dealing 20% explosion damage to up to 5 units.
10224.tc: 竹笋刺客攻擊，插在地上的竹子，1秒後會爆炸，對最多5個組織造成20%的爆炸傷害

10226.en: Bamboo Shoot Assassin Critical Hit Chance +25%

10227.cn: 竹笋刺客竹子爆炸伤害+100%
10227.en: Bamboo Shoot Assassin Bamboo Explosion Damage +100%
10227.tc: 竹笋刺客竹子爆炸傷害+100%

10229.cn: 玉米投手攻击时，40%几率重击造成200%伤害并减速敌人20%，持续2秒
10229.en: When Corn Thrower attacks, it has a 40% chance to deliver a heavy hit, dealing 200% damage and slowing enemies by 20% for 2 seconds.
10229.tc: 玉米投手攻擊時，40%幾率重擊造成200%傷害並减速敵人20%，持續2秒

10232.en: Corn ThrowerHeavy Hit Chance Increased to 100%

10234.cn: 莲花攻击命中后会弹射一次
10234.en: When Lotus's attack hits a target, it bounces once.
10234.tc: 蓮花攻擊命中後會彈射一次

10239.cn: 胆小蘑菇攻击时20%几率喷出毒雾，每秒造成60%伤害，持续3秒
10239.en: Cowardly Mushroom has a 20% chance to spray poison mist on attack, dealing 60% damage per second for 3 seconds.
10239.tc: 膽小蘑菇攻擊時20%幾率噴出毒霧，每秒造成60%傷害，持續3秒

10241.cn: 胆小蘑菇不缩地时，攻击力增加100%
10241.en: Cowardly Mushroom Attack +100% when not shrinking into the ground.
10241.tc: 膽小蘑菇不縮地時，攻擊力新增100%

10244.cn: 西瓜力士攻击时5%的概率爆炸，额外造成一次50%的范围伤害
10244.en: Watermelon Brawler has a 5% chance to explode on attack, dealing an additional 50% area damage.
10244.tc: 西瓜力士攻擊時5%的概率爆炸，額外造成一次50%的範圍傷害

10247.cn: 西瓜力士爆炸产生的伤害+100%
10247.tc: 西瓜力士爆炸產生的傷害+100%

10249.cn: 棉花的攻击命中后会分裂5个次级子弹向周围射击，每个次级子弹50%攻击力
10249.en: When Cotton's attack hits a target, it splits into 5 secondary bullets that shoot around, with each secondary bullet dealing 50% of the base attack damage.
10249.tc: 棉花的攻擊命中後會分裂5個次級子彈向周圍射擊，每個次級子彈50%攻擊力

10252.cn: 棉花次级子弹伤害翻倍
10252.tc: 棉花次級子彈傷害翻倍

10254.cn: 洋葱忍者攻击有50%的概率额外发射一枚手里剑造成200%的伤害
10254.en: Onion Ninja has a 50% chance to fire an additional shuriken on attack, dealing 200% damage.
10254.tc: 洋葱忍者攻擊有50%的概率額外發射一枚手裡劍造成200%的傷害

10257.cn: 洋葱忍者额外发射手里剑的概率提高到100%
10257.en: Onion NinjaChance to Fire Additional Shuriken Increased to 100%
10257.tc: 洋葱忍者額外發射手裡劍的概率提高到100%

10259.cn: 香蕉歌手攻击时20%概率产生涟漪，对最多5个单位造成额外伤害。
10259.en: Banana Singer has a 20% chance to create ripples on attack, dealing additional damage to up to 5 units.
10259.tc: 香蕉歌手攻擊時20%概率產生漣漪，對最多5個組織造成額外傷害。

10262.cn: 香蕉歌手涟漪的触发概率提升到40%
10262.en: Banana SingerRipple Trigger Chance Increased to 40%
10262.tc: 香蕉歌手漣漪的觸發概率提升到40%

10276.en: Damage as a Percentage of Attack

10284.cn: 同时发射的子弹数量增加
10284.en: Increased Number of Simultaneously Fired Bullets
10284.tc: 同時發射的子彈數量新增

10357.cn: 挂机收益道具，可以成长各项基础属性
10357.en: AFK Reward Item; can boost various basic attributes as it levels up
10357.tc: 掛機收益道具，可以成長各項基礎内容

10358.cn: 通用高级货币，主要用于召唤
10358.en: Universal Premium Currency; mainly used for summoning
10358.tc: 通用高級貨幣，主要用於召喚

10361.cn: 用于升级车库车辆等级
10361.en: Used to upgrade garage vehicle levels
10361.tc: 用於陞級車庫車輛等級

10362.en: Used to summon vehicle crew members

10363.cn: 刷新角色属性时锁定一条属性
10363.en: Locks one attribute when refreshing character stats
10363.tc: 重繪角色内容時鎖定一條内容

10364.en: Used to refresh characters during battles

10365.cn: 杂交植物的杂交时使用
10365.tc: 雜交植物的雜交時使用

10366.en: Can be opened to obtain 50 Diamonds

10367.cn: 可以随机开出2-10个视频券，视频券可用于局内战斗抵消视频广告。
10367.en: Can randomly yield 2-10 Video Tickets. Video Tickets can be used to skip video ads during in-match battles.
10367.tc: 可以隨機開出2-10個視頻券，視頻券可用於局內戰鬥抵消視頻廣告。

10368.cn: 无描述，没地方展示这个宝箱
10368.en: No description; no place to display this chest
10368.tc: 無描述，沒地方展示這個寶箱

10372.en: Used for upgrading the corresponding plant

10373.cn: 杂交植物碎片，用于杂交植物升级
10373.en: Hybrid Plant Shard; used for upgrading hybrid plants
10373.tc: 雜交植物碎片，用於雜交植物陞級

10374.cn: 你好，我是你的新邻居，歪比巴卜！
10374.en: Hello, I'm your new neighbor. Wabby Wabbo!
10374.tc: 你好，我是你的新鄰居，歪比巴蔔！

10375.en: Drag the plant and place it in the garden.

10377.cn: 虽然成功抵御了这次尸潮，但是你还得好好学习！
10377.en: We successfully fended off this zombie wave, but you still need to study hard!
10377.tc: 雖然成功抵禦了這次屍潮，但是你還得好好學習！

10378.cn: 解锁了新的植物，上阵它试一试。
10378.en: Unlocked a new plant-deploy it and give it a try!
10378.tc: 解鎖了新的植物，上陣它試一試。

10379.cn: 接下来，点击查看小蘑菇的详细信息。
10379.en: Next, click to view the Small Mushroom's details.
10379.tc: 接下來，點擊查看小蘑菇的詳細資訊。

10381.cn: 满足条件后，会解锁更多强力的植物。
10381.en: After meeting the requirements, more powerful plants will be unlocked.
10381.tc: 滿足條件後，會解鎖更多强力的植物。

10406.en: Isn't the head tasty? | Shut up!!

10408.en: Huh? | Not a single one worth fighting.

10410.en: &……#@ | Save the head to kick like a ball.

10411.en: Behold, you are like those who put up markers to sell their heads.

10419.cn: 召唤出吸铁石，夹击怪物，夹扁怪物（1秒，夹扁的时候，怪物移动速度降低50%)
10419.en: Summons magnets to pinch and flatten monsters (lasting 1 second). While being flattened, the monsters' movement speed is reduced by 50%.
10419.tc: 召喚出吸鐵石，夾擊怪物，夾扁怪物（1秒，夾扁的時候，怪物移動速度降低50%）

10420.cn: 爆炸100%攻击3条路，带3秒火焰，每秒造成1次50%伤害
10420.en: Explodes to attack 3 lanes with 100% damage, leaving 3 seconds of flames that deal 50% damage once per second.
10420.tc: 爆炸100%攻擊3條路，帶3秒火焰，每秒造成1次50%傷害

10421.cn: 直接在地面撒5个番茄炸弹，连环爆炸造成直径150范围AOE伤害
10421.en: Directly scatters 5 Tomato Bombs on the ground, which trigger a chain explosion dealing AOE damage with a diameter of 150.
10421.tc: 直接在地面撒5個蕃茄炸彈，連環爆炸造成直徑150範圍AOE傷害

10422.cn:
丢一串葡萄，爆炸造成直径100的范围伤害，爆炸分裂出5个小葡萄变成弹球，持续4秒，
可以穿透敌人造成伤害，碰撞到一次掉一次血。
（在怪物路径和屏幕边缘的区域内弹射，持续时间到后消失）
10422.en: Throw a bunch of grapes. The explosion deals area damage with a diameter of 100. After the explosion, 5 small grapes split off and turn into pinballs, lasting for 4 seconds. These pinballs can pierce through enemies to deal damage, and enemies lose health each time they are hit by the pinballs. (The pinballs bounce within the monster path and the area near the screen edges, and disappear when their duration ends.)
10422.tc:
“丟一串葡萄，爆炸造成直徑100的範圍傷害，爆炸分裂出5個小葡萄變成彈球，持續4秒，
可以穿透敵人造成傷害，碰撞到一次掉一次血。
（在怪物路徑和荧幕邊緣的區域內彈射，持續時間到後消失）“

10424.cn: 从天而降掉落在第一个怪前面，可以阻挡怪物，怪物撞墙时原地移动，1秒后核桃墙爆炸，造成直径200的范围伤害
10424.en: Falls from the sky in front of the first monster, capable of blocking monsters. When monsters collide with the wall, they move in place. The Wall-Nut explodes after 1 second, dealing area damage with a diameter of 200.
10424.tc: 從天而降掉落在第一個怪前面，可以阻擋怪物，怪物撞牆時原地移動，1秒後核桃牆爆炸，造成直徑200的範圍傷害

10425.cn: 发射3枚胡萝卜大炮，攻击敌人造成直径150范围伤害
10425.en: Launches 3 Carrot Cannon projectiles, attacking enemies and dealing area damage with a diameter of 150.
10425.tc: 發射3枚胡蘿蔔大炮，攻擊敵人造成直徑150範圍傷害

10433.cn: 冰冻场上的随机4个植物，使这些植物被冰冻不能输出。需要被点击5次可以破冰。
10433.en: Freeze 4 random plants on the field so that these frozen plants cannot output. They can be thawed after being clicked 5 times.
10433.tc: 冰凍場上的隨機4個植物，使這些植物被冰凍不能輸出。 需要被點擊5次可以破冰。

10434.cn: 标记场上随机随机一个植物，然后射出炮弹，炮弹飞行缓慢，可以用手指点击炮弹，点击10下可以摧毁炮弹.若炮弹击中植物则植物被摧毁
10434.en: Mark a random plant on the field and then fire a shell. The shell flies slowly and can be clicked with a finger. It takes 10 clicks to destroy the shell. If the shell hits a plant, the plant will be destroyed.
10434.tc: 標記場上隨機隨機一個植物，然後射出炮彈，炮彈飛行緩慢，可以用手指點擊炮彈，點擊10下可以摧毀炮彈. 若炮彈擊中植物則植物被摧毀

10435.cn: BOSS会召唤1个蹦极僵尸，随机出现在1个植物上面，3秒后会抱走植物
10435.en: The BOSS will summon a Bungee Zombie, which will randomly appear above a plant and carry the plant away after 3 seconds.
10435.tc: BOSS會召喚1個高空彈跳僵屍，隨機出現在1個植物上面，3秒後會抱走植物

10436.cn: BOSS会在弹球区域场地内召唤2个钻头僵尸钻破地面形成坑洞，持续20秒，弹球路过坑洞会掉下去，过3秒，弹球才会重新刷新出来（玩家需要策略 用植物讲黑洞围起来，不让弹球触碰到黑洞）
10436.en: The BOSS will summon two Drill Zombies in the pinball area. The Drill Zombies will drill through the ground to create potholes that last for 20 seconds. If a pinball passes by a pothole, it will fall in. It takes 3 seconds for the pinball to respawn. (Players need to use a strategy to surround the potholes with plants to prevent the pinballs from touching them.)
10436.tc: BOSS會在彈球區域場地內召喚2個鑽頭僵屍鑽破地面形成坑洞，持續20秒，彈球路過坑洞會掉下去，過3秒，彈球才會重新重繪出來（玩家需要策略用植物講黑洞圍起來，不讓彈球觸碰到黑洞）

10437.cn: 召唤一台洒水车从屏幕左侧最上方往下行驶，并且持续向右方释放高压水枪，被水枪击中的植物直接被冲飞，洒水车出现的时候，植物会优先攻击洒水车。
10437.en: A sprinkler truck will be summoned. It moves downward from the top - left of the screen and continuously sprays a high - pressure water jet to the right. Plants hit by the water jet will be directly blown away. When the sprinkler truck appears, plants will attack it first.
10437.tc: 召喚一臺灑水車從荧幕左側最上方往下行駛，並且持續向右方釋放高壓水槍，被水槍擊中的植物直接被沖飛，灑水車出現的時候，植物會優先攻擊灑水車。

10438.cn: BOSS投掷一个僵尸头颅持续10秒，头颅的移动速度较慢。头颅和阳光球一样可以弹，当他弹到植物时，会给植物一个标记，当单个植物标记满3个时，植物会被炸毁。（可根据标记数量，将快达标的植物不断拖动来规避）。头颅消失时，标记重置。
10438.en: The BOSS throws a zombie's head that lasts for 10 seconds. The head moves at a slow speed. Similar to sun orbs, the head can bounce. When it bounces into a plant, it will place a mark on the plant. When a single plant accumulates 3 marks, it will be blown up. (Players can keep dragging plants that are close to reaching the mark limit to avoid destruction.) When the head disappears, the marks are reset.
10438.tc: BOSS投擲一個僵屍頭顱持續10秒，頭顱的移動速度較慢。 頭顱和陽光球一樣可以彈，當他彈到植物時，會給植物一個標記，當單個植物標記滿3個時，植物會被炸毀。 （可根據標記數量，將快達標的植物不斷拖動來規避）。 頭顱消失時，標記重置。

10439.cn: BOSS会腐化你两个植物，持续10秒。腐化期间，阳光球碰到该腐化植物后，植物会攻击自己的基地
10439.en: The BOSS will corrupt two of your plants for 10 seconds. During the corruption period, when a sun orb touches a corrupted plant, the plant will attack its own base.
10439.tc: BOSS會腐化你兩個植物，持續10秒。 腐化期間，陽光球碰到該腐化植物後，植物會攻擊自己的基地

10482.cn: 可透视横向一排罐子中的物品,持续3秒
10482.en: Allows you to see through the items in a horizontal row of cans for 3 seconds
10482.tc: 可透視橫向一排罐子中的物品，持續3秒

10483.cn: 让所有僵尸冰冻在原地3秒
10483.en: Freeze all zombies in place for 3 seconds.
10483.tc: 讓所有僵屍冰凍在原地3秒

10484.cn: 对单一僵尸使用，禁锢10秒
10484.en: Use on a single zombie to imprison it for 10 seconds.
10484.tc: 對單一僵屍使用，禁錮10秒

10485.cn: 使范围内僵尸移速降低50%持续5秒
10485.en: Reduce the movement speed of zombies within the area by 50% for 5 seconds.
10485.tc: 使範圍內僵屍移速降低50%持續5秒

10512.cn: 普攻发射5个子弹，攻击降低60%
10512.en: In a normal attack, it fires 5 bullets with a 60% reduction in attack power.
10512.tc: 普攻發射5個子彈，攻擊降低60%

10513.cn: 每5次攻击，360度角度共计发射18个子弹，每颗子弹60%伤害
10513.en: Every 5 attacks, it fires a total of 18 bullets in a 360 - degree arc, with each bullet dealing 60% damage.
10513.tc: 每5次攻擊，360度角度共計發射18個子彈，每顆子彈60%傷害

10515.cn: 发射1个风扇叶，造成穿透伤害，穿透伤害80%
10515.en: Fires a fan blade that causes piercing damage, with the piercing damage being 80%.
10515.tc: 發射1個風扇葉，造成穿透傷害，穿透傷害80%

10516.cn: 每5次攻击，投掷5个魅惑子弹，命中的僵尸会被魅惑原地发愣2秒
10516.en: Every 5 attacks, throws 5 charm bullets. Zombies hit by them will be charmed and stand dazed in place for 2 seconds.
10516.tc: 每5次攻擊，投擲5個魅惑子彈，命中的僵屍會被魅惑原地發愣2秒

10517.cn: 同时发射1个子弹，每个子弹会弹射5次，弹射伤害20%
10517.en: Fires 1 bullet at a time, and each bullet will bounce 5 times, with the bouncing damage being 20%.
10517.tc: 同時發射1個子彈，每個子彈會彈射5次，彈射傷害20%

10518.cn: 每5次攻击，会化身窝瓜跳入怪堆碾压怪物造成240%范围伤害
10518.en: Every 5 attacks, it will transform into a Squash and jump into the mob of monsters, crushing them and dealing 240% area damage.
10518.tc: 每5次攻擊，會化身窩瓜跳入怪堆碾壓怪物造成240%範圍傷害

10519.cn: 每次攻击都附带减速50%效果，持续2秒
10519.en: Each attack comes with a 50% slow - down effect that lasts for 2 seconds.
10519.tc: 每次攻擊都附帶减速50%效果，持續2秒

10520.cn: 每5次攻击，使用雷云范围轰炸，造成2次120%伤害
10520.en: Every 5 attacks, it uses a thundercloud for area bombardment, dealing 120% damage twice.
10520.tc: 每5次攻擊，使用雷雲範圍轟炸，造成2次120%傷害

10521.cn: 每5次攻击，召唤影分身，攻击3次每次造成80%范围伤害，
10521.en: Every 5 attacks, it summons shadow clones. The clones will attack 3 times, dealing 80% area damage each time.
10521.tc: 每5次攻擊，召喚影分身，攻擊3次每次造成80%範圍傷害，

10522.cn: 每5次攻击，向前方大吼减速怪物50%持续3秒，并击退20距离。
10522.en: Every 5 attacks, it lets out a loud roar forward, slowing down the monsters by 50% for 3 seconds and knocking them back by a distance of 20 units.
10522.tc: 每5次攻擊，向前方大吼减速怪物50%持續3秒，並擊退20距離。

10523.cn: 变身火爆核桃，血量提高100%
10523.en: Transform into a Hot Pepperonator, increasing its health by 100%.
10523.tc: 變身火爆核桃，血量提高100%

10525.cn: 攻击选中的1条路，可吸走神父僵尸十字架，使其无法复活
10525.en: Attack the selected lane. It can suck away the cross of the Priest Zombie, preventing it from resurrecting.
10525.tc: 攻擊選中的1條路，可吸走神父僵屍十字架，使其無法復活

10526.cn: 攻击选中的1条路带8秒火焰，每秒造成1次30点伤害
10526.en: Attack the selected lane with 8 seconds of flames. It deals 30 damage points once per second.
10526.tc: 攻擊選中的1條路帶8秒火焰，每秒造成1次30點傷害

10527.cn: 攻击选中的范围，造成80点伤害,可引爆自爆桶僵尸
10527.en: Attack the selected area, dealing 80 damage points. It can detonate the Exploding Barrel Zombie.
10527.tc: 攻擊選中的範圍，造成80點傷害，可引爆自爆桶僵屍

10528.cn: 攻击选中的范围，造成240点伤害
10528.en: Attack the selected area, dealing 240 damage points.
10528.tc: 攻擊選中的範圍，造成240點傷害

10529.cn: 召唤竹刺陷阱，全屏刺持每秒造成16点伤害，持续5秒
10529.en: Summon the Bamboo Spike Trap. The spikes across the whole screen deal 16 damage points per second for 5 seconds.
10529.tc: 召喚竹刺陷阱，全屏刺持每秒造成16點傷害，持續5秒

10530.en: Can attack blimp and deal full - screen damage

10545.cn: 摇晃枪口45°的角度，连续射出子弹
10545.en: Sways the muzzle at a 45° angle and fires bullets continuously
10545.tc: 搖晃槍口45°的角度，連續射出子彈

10546.cn: 发射1个风扇叶，风扇叶旋转的时候会扫出小蘑菇的一圈5个子弹
10546.en: Fires 1 fan blade; when the fan blade spins, it sweeps out a circle of 5 bullets like small mushrooms
10546.tc: 發射1個風扇葉，風扇葉旋轉的時候會掃出小蘑菇的一圈5個子彈

10547.cn: 甘蔗插着包菜是一个整体，一下抛投出10个此子弹。然后定在地上以后过1秒爆炸
10547.en: Sugarcane with a cabbage attached is a single unit. It throws out 10 such bullets at once, which stick to the ground and explode after 1 second
10547.tc: 甘蔗插著包菜是一個整體，一下拋投出10個此子彈。 然後定在地上以後過1秒爆炸

10548.cn: 抛投出3个巨大的风扇叶，落地以后原地旋转5秒，每0.5秒造成1次伤害
10548.en: Throws 3 giant fan blades. After landing, they spin in place for 5 seconds and deal damage once every 0.5 seconds
10548.tc: 拋投出3個巨大的風扇葉，落地以後原地旋轉5秒，每0.5秒造成1次傷害

10549.cn: 地震效果，然后地面垄起突刺，往上扎一下，被扎的怪物都跳到空中再落地（过程1.5秒，相当于控制怪物1.5秒）
10549.en: An earthquake effect occurs first. Then, spikes protrude from the ground and stab upward. The monsters that are stabbed jump into the air and then land on the ground. This whole process lasts for 1.5 seconds, which is equivalent to controlling the monsters for 1.5 seconds.
10549.tc: 地震效果，然後地面壟起突刺，往上紮一下，被紮的怪物都跳到空中再落地（過程1.5秒，相當於控制怪物1.5秒）

10550.cn: 投射3个胆大菇到怪物面前，跳起来压扁怪物
10550.en: Project three Bold Mumushrooms in front of the monsters, and they will jump up and squash the monsters.
10550.tc: 投射3個膽大菇到怪物面前，跳起來壓扁怪物

10551.cn: 场上滚出5个大量西瓜，持续4秒
10551.en: Project three Bold Mumushrooms in front of the monsters, and they will jump up and squash the monsters.
10551.tc: 場上滾出5個大量西瓜，持續4秒

10552.cn: 造成一次全屏原子弹爆炸伤害
10552.en: Project three Bold Mumushrooms in front of the monsters, and they will jump up and squash the monsters.
10552.tc: 造成一次全屏核子弹爆炸傷害

10553.cn: 抛投出多个忍者影分身，每一个落地都会释放一次螺旋丸
10553.en: Throw out multiple ninja clones. Each clone will release a Rasengan when it lands.
10553.tc: 拋投出多個忍者影分身，每一個落地都會釋放一次螺旋丸

10554.cn: 出现雷云攻击敌人的同时，在区域内刮起火旋风，移动卷动肆虐，造成高额伤害
10554.en: When a thundercloud appears to attack the enemy, a fire whirlwind stirs up in the area, moving, rolling, and raging, causing high - value damage.
10554.tc: 出現雷雲攻擊敵人的同時，在區域內刮起火旋風，移動捲動肆虐，造成高額傷害

10555.cn: 出现两个忍者在植物旁边，发射2个螺旋丸直线飞出，同时伴随螺旋丸的还有大量手里剑扫射出去
10555.en: Two ninjas appear beside the plants and launch two Rasengan that fly straight out. Along with the Rasengan, a large number of shurikens are also shot out.
10555.tc: 出現兩個忍者在植物旁邊，發射2個螺旋丸直線飛出，同時伴隨螺旋丸的還有大量手裡劍掃射出去

10556.cn: 出现一个狙击镜，然后一发超高攻击，击碎屏幕的特效。造成小范围伤害
10556.en: A sniper scope appears, followed by an ultra - high attack with a screen - shattering special effect, causing damage in a small area.
10556.tc: 出現一個狙擊鏡，然後一發超高攻擊，擊碎荧幕的特效。 造成小範圍傷害

10575.cn: 全图随机指定目标对其及周围半径200造成落雷范围伤害
10575.en: Randomly designate a target in the entire map to deal lightning damage within a radius of 200 to it and its surroundings
10575.tc: 全圖隨機指定目標對其及周圍半徑200造成落雷範圍傷害

10580.cn: boss技：击碎周围3*3的所有罐子
10580.en: Boss Technique: Smash all 3 * 3 cans around you
10580.tc: boss技：擊碎周圍3*3的所有罐子

10585.cn: boss技：死亡后随机杀死1个己方角色
10585.en: Boss Technique: Randomly kill 1 friendly character after death
10585.tc: boss技：死亡後隨機殺死1個己方角色

10590.cn: boss技：出现时瞬移到第6排罐子处
10590.en: Boss technique: teleport to the 6th row of jars when appearing
10590.tc: boss技：出現時瞬移到第6排罐子處aring

10595.cn: boss技：所有己方角色攻速降低100%持续5秒
10595.en: Boss skill: All friendly characters' attack speed is reduced by 100% for 5 seconds
10595.tc: boss技：所有己方角色攻速降低100%持續5秒
